Functions.Name: GetGVoiceInterface
Functions.Description:
获取 Voice 组件
生效范围：客户端

Return.Description: 对应语音管理类的指针

Functions.Name: GetPlayerMemberID
Functions.Description:
获取玩家的语音房间 MemberID
生效范围：服务器

Functions.Name: JoinVoiceRoom
Functions.Description:
加入语音房间
RoomKey 为语音房间唯一标识，可由自己进行拼接
生效范围：客户端

Functions.Name: QuitVoiceRoom
Functions.Description:
退出 UGC 语音房间
生效范围：客户端

Functions.Name: GetVoiceRoomKey
Functions.Description:
获取当前房间 RoomKey
生效范围：客户端

Functions.Name: SetGlobalVoiceRadius
Functions.Description:
设置全局语音生效范围
生效范围：客户端

Functions.Name: SetVoiceRoomSoundEnable
Functions.Description:
开启/关闭语音房间喇叭
生效范围：客户端

Functions.Name: SetVoiceRoomMicrophoneEnable
Functions.Description:
开启/关闭语音房间麦克风
生效范围：客户端

Functions.Name: SetGlobalVoiceSoundEnable
Functions.Description:
开启/关闭全局语音喇叭
生效范围：客户端

Functions.Name: SeGlobalVoiceMicrophoneEnable
Functions.Description:
开启/关闭 全局语音麦克风
生效范围：客户端

Functions.Name: SetVoiceRoomPlayerMuteState
Functions.Description:
设置语音房间指定玩家语音屏蔽（静音）状态
生效范围：客户端

Params.Name: MemberID
Params.Description: 当前房间要被屏蔽的玩家的 UID

Functions.Name: SetGlobalVoicePlayerMuteState
Functions.Description:
设置全局房间指定玩家语音屏蔽（静音）状态
生效范围：客户端

Params.Name: MemberID
Params.Description: 当前房间要被屏蔽的玩家的 MemberID

Functions.Name: IsVoiceRoomSoundEnable
Functions.Description:
获得语音房间声音（喇叭）开关状态
生效范围：客户端

Functions.Name: IsVoiceRoomMicrophoneEnable
Functions.Description:
获得语音房间麦克风开关状态
生效范围：客户端

Functions.Name: IsGlobalVoiceSoundEnable
Functions.Description:
获得全局语音声音（喇叭）开关状态
生效范围：客户端

Functions.Name: IsGlobalVoiceMicrophoneEnable
Functions.Description:
获得全局语音麦克风开关状态
生效范围：客户端

Functions.Name: JoinGlobalVoiceRoom
Functions.Description:
加入全局语音房间（依赖于全局语音房间的某个范围可听可说,区域语音，包厢等等）
生效范围：客户端

Functions.Name: QuitGlobalVoiceRoom
Functions.Description:
退出全局语音房间（区域语音，包厢等等）
生效范围：客户端

Functions.Name: CloseCivilVoiceDetect
Functions.Description:
关闭文明语音检测和 lbs 小号限制
生效范围：客户端
